result.stdout:
Description:
  Xtraq CLI

Usage:
  Xtraq [command] [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbose                                 Show additional diagnostic information
  --debug                                       Use debug environment settings
  --debug-alias                                 Enable alias scope debug logging (promotes XTRAQ_LOG_LEVEL to debug)
  --no-cache                                    Do not read or write the local procedure metadata cache
  --no-update                                   Skip update checks and prompts for this run
  --procedure <procedure>                       Process only specific procedures (comma separated schema.name with optional '*' or '?' wildcards)
  --telemetry                                   Persist a database telemetry report to .xtraq/telemetry
  --ci                                          Disable Spectre.Console enhancements for CI/plain output modes
  -p, --project, --project-path <project-path>  Project root path (.env file or directory). Defaults to current directory when omitted.
  -?, -h, --help                                Show help and usage information
  --version                                     Show version information

Commands:
  snapshot <project-path>  Capture database metadata into .xtraq snapshots
  build <project-path>     Generate client artefacts from local snapshots
  version                  Show installed and latest Xtraq versions
  update                   Update Xtraq Global Tool to the latest version
  init <project-path>      Initialize Xtraq project (.env bootstrap)

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate client artefacts from local snapshots

Usage:
  Xtraq build [<project-path>] [options]

Arguments:
  <project-path>  Optional project root path (.env file or directory). Defaults to current directory when omitted.

Options:
  --refresh-snapshot                            Refresh snapshot before executing the build command
  -?, -h, --help                                Show help and usage information
  -v, --verbose                                 Show additional diagnostic information
  --debug                                       Use debug environment settings
  --debug-alias                                 Enable alias scope debug logging (promotes XTRAQ_LOG_LEVEL to debug)
  --no-cache                                    Do not read or write the local procedure metadata cache
  --no-update                                   Skip update checks and prompts for this run
  --procedure <procedure>                       Process only specific procedures (comma separated schema.name with optional '*' or '?' wildcards)
  --telemetry                                   Persist a database telemetry report to .xtraq/telemetry
  --ci                                          Disable Spectre.Console enhancements for CI/plain output modes
  -p, --project, --project-path <project-path>  Project root path (.env file or directory). Defaults to current directory when omitted.

Description:

result.stdout:
Description:
  Initialize Xtraq project (.env bootstrap)

Usage:
  Xtraq init [<project-path>] [options]

Arguments:
  <project-path>  Target directory or .env file. Defaults to current directory when omitted.

Options:
  -f, --force                                   Overwrite existing .env
  -n, --namespace <namespace>                   Root namespace (XTRAQ_NAMESPACE)
  -c, --connection <connection>                 Snapshot connection string (XTRAQ_GENERATOR_DB)
  -s, --schemas <schemas>                       Comma separated allow-list (XTRAQ_BUILD_SCHEMAS)
  -?, -h, --help                                Show help and usage information
  -v, --verbose                                 Show additional diagnostic information
  --debug                                       Use debug environment settings
  --debug-alias                                 Enable alias scope debug logging (promotes XTRAQ_LOG_LEVEL to debug)
  --no-cache                                    Do not read or write the local procedure metadata cache
  --no-update                                   Skip update checks and prompts for this run
  --procedure <procedure>                       Process only specific procedures (comma separated schema.name with optional '*' or '?' wildcards)
  --telemetry                                   Persist a database telemetry report to .xtraq/telemetry
  --ci                                          Disable Spectre.Console enhancements for CI/plain output modes
  -p, --project, --project-path <project-path>  Project root path (.env file or directory). Defaults to current directory when omitted.
